case_title: PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. vs. YOON, SEOCK-KYU et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOON, SEOCK-KYU UNAPPROVED OCCUPANT ARM PARK UNAPPROVED OCCUPANT JUNG YOON UNAPPROVED OCCUPANT MI HEE PARK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 55 CHUMASERO DRIVE, 8-L, LEASE FORFEITED, STIPULATED-SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR ALL TERMS & CONDITIONS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT YOON, SEOCK-KYU UNAPPROVED OCCUPANT ARM PARK UNAPPROVED OCCUPANT JUNG YOON UNAPPROVED OCCUPANT MI HEE PARK DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
INVALID/RETURNED CHECK FOR TRANSACTION 3813P1360000 FOR FIRST PAPER RESPONSE/PLEADING $2,500 - $10,000
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $31.29 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT YOON, SEOCK-KYU UNAPPROVED OCCUPANT ARM PARK UNAPPROVED OCCUPANT JUNG YOON UNAPPROVED OCCUPANT MI HEE PARK
